query: severely underexposed dark photo crushed shadows black murky
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — severe underexposure, crushed shadows, dark murky atmosphere, mood-driven black tones

response.objective_caption: A barely visible geometric form, possibly a pyramid or angled triangular structure, occupies the lower right area with a faint light catching one edge, while the remainder of the frame is immersed in near-total blackness with no discernible background elements or additional subjects.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A barely visible geometric form, possibly a pyramid or angled triangular structure, occupies the lower right area with only a faint glimmer of light on one edge amid severe underexposure that consumes nearly the entire frame in blackness. The crushing absence of light and detail evokes a heavy sense of dread and unease through the suffocating, minimalist darkness.
